title: Synthetic Active Loop
creator: XinOne project
generation: uv run python tools/sound/sfx_generator.py --input-file scores/shared-active-bgm.mml --style square --duty 0.25 --track-file scores/shared-active-bgm-bass.mml --track-style triangle --attack 0.002 --decay 0.03 --sustain 0.7 --release 0.04 --volume 0.65 -o output/bgm/active (44.1 kHz); then resample to 22.05 kHz mono 16-bit PCM via scipy.signal.resample_poly(audio, up=1, down=2) and scale peak to ~0.82.
